title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Thank you! I can't believe how many you
got!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Were you using techniques pioneered by ancient
Japanese masters or something? You were so
brilliant, I would believe it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! We need to take a picture to
commemorate this!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, let's take one together! We
can use one of those special booths that prints
stickers! ♪
